scripts.setup:dev: npm install && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.setup:sqlite: cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./prisma/dev.db node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma && cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./prisma/dev.db node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js db push --schema prisma/schema.sqlite.prisma
scripts.setup:postgres: node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js generate --schema prisma/schema.prisma && node ./node_modules/prisma/build/index.js migrate deploy --schema prisma/schema.prisma
scripts.dev:local: cross-env DATABASE_URL=file:./prisma/dev.db NEXTAUTH_URL=http://localhost:3002 PORT=3002 node ./node_modules/tsx/dist/cli.mjs server/index.ts
scripts.dev:restart: pkill -9 -f 'tsx server/index.ts' 2>/dev/null; pkill -9 -f 'server/index.ts' 2>/dev/null; fuser -k 3002/tcp 2>/dev/null; sleep 2 && npm run dev
scripts.dev:status: lsof -i :3002 && echo '✅ Dev running' || echo '❌ Dev not running'
scripts.build: next build && npx tsc server/index.ts --outDir dist --esModuleInterop --skipLibCheck --module commonjs --target ES2020
